summary: Stage 33.2.1 Testing Complete - Universal Header with Home icon verified on all pages. Renter Dashboard loads correctly (no 404). Partner Bookings has proper date/price handling code. Backend API returns 502 intermittently (preview environment issue).

minor.issue: 502 errors - preview environment issue, not application bug

issues: Next.js metadata warnings: themeColor and viewport should be in viewport export instead of metadata export (minor deprecation warning)

passed_tests.result: PASS - Home icon (teal gradient square) with FunnyRent text visible

passed_tests.test: Universal Header shows Login button for non-authenticated users
passed_tests.result: PASS - Teal 'Login' button visible on right side of header
PASS - Clicking Home icon navigates to homepage from any page
PASS - Page loads with 'My Dashboard' heading
PASS - Total Bookings, Active Trips, Pending, Completed cards visible

passed_tests.test: Universal Header present on Renter Dashboard
passed_tests.result: PASS - Header with Home icon visible
PASS - Page loads with stats cards and empty state when no bookings
PASS - No 'Invalid Date' text found in page content
PASS - No NaN formatting issues found
PASS - Login dialog opens, credentials accepted, redirects to partner dashboard

passed_tests.test: Universal Header shows for authenticated users
passed_tests.result: PASS - After login, header shows Partner button, My Bookings button, user dropdown

passed_tests.test: Homepage loads with search form and listings
passed_tests.result: PASS - Hero section, search form, categories, listings grid visible

action_items: Consider moving themeColor and viewport to viewport export in layout.js (Next.js deprecation warning)
critical_code_review_comments: Partner Bookings correctly handles snake_case API fields (check_in, price_thb, etc.) with fallbacks
Safe date formatting with try/catch in Partner Bookings prevents Invalid Date errors
Universal Header correctly renders Login button for non-auth and user dropdown for auth users

success_rate.backend: N/A (Next.js API routes - intermittent 502s from preview environment)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 33.2.1 features verified. Universal Header shows Home icon (teal square) on all pages. Login button for non-auth users, user dropdown for auth users. Renter Dashboard at /dashboard/renter loads correctly (no 404). Partner Bookings handles snake_case/camelCase fields correctly. The preview environment has intermittent 502 errors on API calls - this appears to be infrastructure, not application bugs.

code_analysis.universal-header.jsx: Properly implements Home icon with teal gradient, shows Login for non-auth users, shows user dropdown and role-based nav buttons for auth users
code_analysis.partner/bookings/page.js: Has fallback handling for both camelCase and snake_case fields (checkIn/check_in, priceThb/price_thb), safe date formatting with try/catch
